title: rhoicissus tridentata
intro: Rhoicissus tridentata, also known as the wine raisin or red milk berry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rhoicissus tridentata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tonic, and can also be used in herbal supplements and tinctures.
